The international diplomatic and intelligence community heavily focused on the massive, incredibly dangerous, and rapidly escalating civil war in Sri Lanka. The massive, highly lucrative world of consumer telecommunications was aggressively shifting toward the deployment of highly advanced, broadband infrastructure. Major aerospace and telecom conglomerates were locked in massive, multi-billion dollar races to heavily upgrade aging copper-wire networks to high-speed Digital Subscriber Lines (DSL) and coaxial cable. In the global technology sector, the massive, destructive reality of the dot-com crash was aggressively driving massive corporate consolidation. The massive, terrifying military collapse of the Sri Lankan Army heavily triggered an absolute, massive political crisis in the southern Indian state of Tamil Nadu. In Andhra Pradesh, the state government fiercely battled an absolute, massive ecological catastrophe. ## SECTION 8 — This Day in History (World)

On May 22, 1960, the absolute, most massive and incredibly powerful earthquake ever recorded in human history aggressively struck southern Chile. The Valdivia earthquake, registering an absolutely staggering 9.5 on the moment magnitude scale, heavily devastated massive swaths of the country. The incredibly violent seismic event aggressively generated massive, catastrophic tsunamis that heavily battered the coasts of Japan, Hawaii, and the Philippines, resulting in the horrific deaths of thousands and fundamentally altering global seismological understanding of megathrust earthquakes.

On May 22, 1990, the massive, highly independent Arab Republic of Yemen and the Marxist People's Democratic Republic of Yemen (South Yemen) officially and aggressively merged. This massive, deeply historic geopolitical unification heavily created the modern, massive state of the Republic of Yemen. The massive unification aggressively ended decades of bitter, Cold War-driven proxy conflicts between the two nations, though the deep, massive internal structural and tribal divisions would continue to heavily plague the unified nation with devastating, aggressive civil wars.

## SECTION 9 — This Day in History (India)

On May 22, 1772, Raja Ram Mohan Roy, the incredibly massive, visionary, and deeply revered "Father of the Bengal Renaissance," was born in Radhanagar, Bengal. A brilliant polymath and fierce social reformer, he aggressively founded the massive Brahmo Samaj to heavily eradicate deeply oppressive Hindu orthodox practices. He achieved absolute, historical immortality by successfully and aggressively campaigning the British colonial administration to legally and completely abolish the horrific, massive practice of *Sati* (widow immolation), fundamentally modernizing Indian society.

On May 22, 1545, Sher Shah Suri, the massive, incredibly brilliant, and highly formidable Afghan ruler who had successfully and aggressively driven the Mughal Emperor Humayun into exile, tragically passed away. He died from horrific, massive injuries sustained during an accidental gunpowder explosion while aggressively commanding the massive siege of the Kalinjar Fort. His incredibly massive, five-year reign fundamentally and heavily revolutionized the massive, administrative, and taxation architecture of northern India, establishing the massive Grand Trunk Road.
